_doc: Sir 2026-05-28 19:20 真意 — 'Jarvis 该懂得自己休息'. 思考脑反复同 thread + 都 SHOULD_SPEAK=false → 视为 saturation → publish raw signal + 软推主动拉长间隔 + 同步软衰减 concern. 准则 6 vocab 持久化, 准则 8 优雅. CLI: scripts/inner_thought_saturation_dump.py.

saturation_trigger._doc: L1 + L3 触发条件 — 多少同 thread + 全 no-speak 视为 saturated. min_thoughts_same_thread 控 publish 触发, min_consecutive_saturated_for_force 控 python 物理 force.

concern_fatigue_softening._doc: L2 — 当某 thread saturated 且 LLM 真在 thought 里提到 concern_id, ProactiveCare 给该 concern 软衰减 (-delta). 24h 自然 decay 回去. 防 jarvis 一直缠住 Sir 不在意的事.

python_physical_force._doc: L3 — LLM 跑偏: 已收到 N 次 saturation raw signal 仍输 NEXT_INTERVAL ≤ 60, python 物理 force NEXT_INTERVAL = force_next_interval_s. 类 _SMOOTH_LOW_SAL 物理保底.

value_backoff._doc: [useful-or-quiet P1 / Sir 2026-05-31] 跨 category 价值门控退避 — 补 saturation 的 same-category 漏洞 (脑 category-hop 逃过). 连续低值 tick (任意 category, salience<floor + not should_speak + actionable 无 effect) → 指数退避 backoff_steps_s; should_speak 或 salience>=reset_on_high_salience → reset 回 baseline. 只拉长不缩短.
